headlines.title: FedEx and UPS face a new pricing threat from an old rival
headlines.summary: FedEx (FDX) and UPS spent half a century as the only two names that mattered in American package delivery. They built the aircraft fleets, sorting hubs and delivery routes that turned next-day shipping into a routine promise.

headlines.title: United Parcel Service (UPS) Outperforms Broader Market: What You Need to Know
headlines.summary: United Parcel Service (UPS) reached $112.47 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a +1.56% change compared to its last close.

headlines.title: UPS, FedEx Top List of Logistics Companies Ranked by Market Cap
headlines.summary: The top 25 of companies in the sector generate $502.2 billion in market capitalization.

headlines.title: Amazon Stock Rises on New Shipping Push. That's Bad News for UPS and FedEx
headlines.summary: Amazon's Low-Cost Shipping Push Raises the Stakes for UPS and FedEx

headlines.title: Morgan Stanley Warns Amazon's Logistics Push Threatens UPS and FedEx
headlines.summary: Amazon's low-cost delivery expansion could intensify competition as overnight shipping may be added in the future.

description: United Parcel Service, Inc., a package delivery and logistics provider, offers transportation and delivery services. It operates through two segments, U.S. Domestic Package and International Package. The U.S. Domestic Package segment offers time-definite delivery services for express letters, documents, packages and palletized freight through air and ground services. The International Package segment provides small package operations in Europe, the Middle East and Africa, Canada and Latin America, and Asia. The company offers a range of guaranteed day- and time-definite international transportation services; day-definite services; cross-border ground package delivery; contract-only, e-commerce solutions for non-urgent, and cross-border shipments; and international service for urgent and palletized shipments. It also provides international air and ocean freight forwarding, contract logistics, customs brokerage and insurance, mail services, healthcare logistics, distribution, and post-sales services. United Parcel Service, Inc. was founded in 1907 and is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia.
